description: Covers the cost of required textbooks, course materials, and essential school supplies.
eligibility_notes: Open to all enrolled students with demonstrated need

description: Supports students at risk of homelessness or facing housing insecurity with rent assistance and temporary housing solutions.
eligibility_notes: Students must be facing imminent housing loss or currently housing insecure

description: Provides immediate financial assistance to students facing unexpected emergencies such as medical expenses, family crises, or sudden loss of housing.
eligibility_notes: Must be enrolled full-time and demonstrate financial need

description: Helps students purchase laptops, tablets, software, and internet access needed for their studies.
eligibility_notes: Priority given to STEM majors and students without personal computers
